negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing end-to-end per-phase timing emission from payload building, block execution, and block verification. Metrics structs/log helpers exist, but local payload and verifier code do not call them for async/scheduled/regular/finalization/verification phases.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-metrics defines BlockBuildPhaseTrace, BlockBuildAttemptTrace, record_block_build_attempt, log_payload_phase, and RPC conversion for traces.
Searches found no wiring from ethereum/payload or ritual-block-verification into these phase metrics.

rationale: The instrumentation lineage starts with payload phases, expands to execution phases, and adds verification phases while preserving the same phase-recording concept.
statement: Payload building, block execution, and block verification should emit per-phase timing metrics with phase labels, block number, timestamp/duration information, and relevant transaction or event counts for async, scheduled, regular, finalization, and verification phases.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build a payload with scheduled, async, and regular candidates and assert emitted BlockBuildAttemptTrace.phases contains per-phase labels/counts/durations.
Run block verification and assert verification phase metrics are emitted.
summary: Phase timing metric infrastructure exists, but payload/verifier phase emission is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Enable block-build trace collection and build/verify a block; current code has trace types but no payload/verifier phase emission sites.
title: Payload and verification phases emit timing metrics
